'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 140''' was the one hundred and fortieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 1]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force|Yuuzhan Vong Incursions]] {{C|YUU 11-12}}
**<small>Final chapter in the galactic crisis.</small>
*[[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker Family Tree]] {{C|FAM 1-2}}
**<small>Ancestry of the galaxy's most famous dynasty.</small>
*The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] {{C|HUT 15-18}}
**<small>Overview of the crime-loving species that is reviled on countless worlds.</small>
*[[Kyle Katarn]] {{C|KAT 5-8}}
**<small>Imperial recruit who became a valuable Rebel agent.</small>
*[[Eeth Koth/Legends|Eeth Koth]] {{C|KOT 3-4}}
**<small>Zabrak Jedi Council member with a high pain threshold.</small>
*[[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] {{C|MUN 5-6}}
**<small>Experienced Jedi who became Anakin Skywalker's temporary Master.</small>
*Baron [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] {{C|FEL 1-2}}
**<small>Fighter ace who served the Empire, the Rebellion and the New Republic.</small>
*[[Het Nkik/Legends|Het Nkik]] {{C|NKI 1-2}}
**<small>Young Jawa on Tatooine.</small>
*[[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] {{C|DEV 1-2}}
**<small>Homeworld of the Devaronians, where females rule.</small>
*[[:Category:Medical technology|Surgical Technology]] {{C|SUR 9-10}}
**<small>More of the fiendish medical methods employed by the immoral.</small>
